---
title: "Making a reproducible website with blogdown in 2021"
date: 2021-01-03
categories: [news]
tags: [R, blogdown]
description: "How I set up this site using Hugo and R"
---

For people interested in how I set this site up, see the changes tracked on GitHub to transition to the new site: https://github.com/rbind/robinlovelace/pull/5

This site was built using blogdown and Hugo. The key benefits are:
- Fully reproducible
- Version controlled
- Free hosting on Netlify/GitHub Pages
- R Markdown support
